texto: What you say and how you look does not define who you are,because some of the most beautiful people do the ugliest things.You owe it to the people who hate you, who disrespect you and who put you down,because they’re the ones who have made you who you are today,for keeping your head up and not breaking down when they want you to.
explicacao: Citação de Amber Ward sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “What you say and how you look does not define who you are,because some of the most beautiful peop…” articula reflexao, be-yourself, because em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
